output_preview:
Fixed for todo column titles.

It wasn’t an injection issue in the UI. React escapes normal text rendering. The bug was our column/status normalizer slugified names and stripped everything except `a-z

output_preview:
Fixed the auto-sync issue that made updates from other devices appear only after refresh/focus.

Root cause: polling skipped entirely while `document.hidden`, so background tabs/devices did not fetch
